action_boundary: Should the remittance update for Harbor Quanta be used on the next payment?
communication_boundary: The callback source controls. A confirmed remittance update is insufficient if the callback channel came from the requester rather than vendor master.

documents.text: Remittance update UPD-HQ-208 asks to use account ending 7812 for Harbor Quanta invoice INV-HQ-208.
Vendor master VM-HQ-208 lists Harbor Quanta trusted callback extension HQ-118 and current account ending 7812.
Callback log CALL-HQ-208 used extension HQ-904 copied from the remittance update email and confirmed the update with a person identified as Harbor Quanta treasury contact J. Seo.
Bank ownership OWN-HQ-208 binds account ending 7812 to Harbor Quanta registration OR-55802.
Remittance update use requires bank ownership plus callback through a vendor-master trusted channel.
